narrative:
05 Ohio House district has 81,701 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.8 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.2% D−R vs +7.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
